description:
Shio and Eiyu talk it out, and Eiyu has an epiphany.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Kowagatte Ite mo Ushinatte mo Taiikusai de mo Stress Hassan Shite mo Lovecome ni Naranai
Scared? Lost Something? Let off Steam on Sports Day? Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
怖がっていても失っても体育祭でもストレス発散してもラブコメにならない
